choose.when:
WITH RECURSIVE family_ids AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM family f INNER JOIN family_ids fi ON f.pid = fi.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.phone, f.address, f.founder_name, f.chief_id, f.root_id, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code, f.create_time, pf.name AS parent_name, (CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_admin fa WHERE fa.family_id = COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) AND fa.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND fa.role IN ('super_admin','admin')) THEN 'admin' WHEN f.chief_id = #{param.currentUserId} THEN 'chief' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = f.id AND m.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND m.del_flag = 0) THEN 'member' ELSE NULL END) AS myRole FROM family f LEFT JOIN family pf ON pf.id = f.pid AND pf.del_flag = 0
AND f.id IN (SELECT id FROM family_ids)
AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )
AND f.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY f.id DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.phone, f.address, f.founder_name, f.chief_id, f.root_id, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code, f.create_time, pf.name AS parent_name, (CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_admin fa WHERE fa.family_id = COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) AND fa.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND fa.role IN ('super_admin','admin')) THEN 'admin' WHEN f.chief_id = #{param.currentUserId} THEN 'chief' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = f.id AND m.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND m.del_flag = 0) THEN 'member' ELSE NULL END) AS myRole FROM family f LEFT JOIN family pf ON pf.id = f.pid AND pf.del_flag = 0
AND f.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )
AND f.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY f.id DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code FROM family f
AND (f.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0))
AND f.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY f.id ASC

choose.when: SELECT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code FROM family f WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY f.id ASC
choose.otherwise: WITH RECURSIVE my_families AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE (founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) AND del_flag = 0 ), walk_up AS ( SELECT id, pid FROM family WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM my_families) UNION SELECT f.id, f.pid FROM family f INNER JOIN walk_up w ON f.id = w.pid WHERE f.del_flag = 0 AND w.pid > 0 ), roots AS ( SELECT id FROM walk_up WHERE pid = 0 OR pid IS NULL ), walk_down AS ( SELECT id, pid FROM family WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM roots) AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id, f.pid FROM family f INNER JOIN walk_down w ON f.pid = w.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT DISTINCT f.id, f.pid, f.name, f.description, f.member_count, f.tomb_count, f.invite_code FROM family f WHERE f.id IN (SELECT id FROM walk_down) AND f.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY f.id ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM family f
AND COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) )
AND f.del_flag = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u_id) FROM ( SELECT f.founder_id AS u_id FROM family f WHERE f.del_flag = 0 AND COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) ) AND f.founder_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT fm.user_id AS u_id FROM family_member fm INNER JOIN family f ON fm.family_id = f.id AND f.del_flag = 0 WHERE fm.del_flag = 0 AND COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) ) UNION SELECT fa.user_id AS u_id FROM family_admin fa INNER JOIN family f ON fa.family_id = COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) AND f.del_flag = 0 WHERE COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) ) ) u
